text: I want to build a habit tracking app — but really simple, just one habit.
Love the simplicity angle. What's the main pain that existing apps don't solve for you?
They give you too many habits to track and I get overwhelmed after two days.
Got it — the constraint is the feature. I'll capture that as the core vision: one habit, big streak counter, nothing else. Writing the vision brief now.
Vision brief saved to docs/office/01-vision-brief.md. Passing to Product Manager.
